falsifier: The forged-vs-legitimate split no longer holds, recall falls below the documented threshold, or false positives exceed the documented bound.
threat_model_scope: Local fixture and mechanics claim; excludes compromised production keys and does not imply adaptive-attack coverage unless explicitly modeled.
public_note: Strongest paper-friendly public lane in the current repo state: chain integrity does not automatically imply authentic lineage.
claim_boundary: Valid later nodes are inserts, not authentic replacements for the canonical lineage.
